response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong track record of technical craftsmanship and leadership initiative, including founding an open-source project. He meets the minimum requirement for years of experience and has recently started working in the AI space. However, his profile does not align well with the director-level strategic focus of the role. His deep experience with AI appears very recent, lacking the demonstrated, long-term expertise and history of building major AI-powered platforms required for a Principal-level strategy position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrates strong leadership and entrepreneurial initiative through founding GISCollective and organizing technical workshops.
Current role provides direct, hands-on experience with modern AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Lacks significant, long-term experience in AI/ML; expertise appears very recent and not at a strategic level.
Resume is heavily focused on hands-on implementation, not the high-level strategic planning and customer advisory required.
Experience is at a strong Senior/Staff level, which may not meet the director-level seniority and influence expected for this role.
